name: briefing_objective_picture_draw_noise_overlay
description: HudUiBriefingObjectivePicture::DrawWithNoiseOverlay draws the base objective picture and applies the static noise overlay when alpha is positive.
known_limits: VC5SP3 COFF byte verification for briefing_objective_picture_draw_noise_overlay currently fails with 84 unmasked mismatches, 20 relocation bytes, and 5 trimmed NOPs; Binary-safe remains false.

Binary Ninja shows the DrawWithNoiseOverlay body as source-ready, including the direct HudUiWidget::Draw call, noiseAlpha <= 0 early return, center-coordinate virtual calls, image-dimension null guards, and zVid::DrawNoiseRect dispatch.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x4038a0 were reviewed after HudUiWidget::Draw became functionally accepted.

The native smoke invokes the objective-picture vtable DrawWithNoiseOverlay entry from a constructed briefing runtime, verifies the base picture blit with zero alpha, verifies no noise pixels change below the alpha threshold, and verifies the positive-alpha noise rectangle covers x/y through x+width/y+height.
